items.title: Samsung and NVIDIA to advance AI-RAN technologies
items.what: Samsung announced AI-RAN collaboration with NVIDIA, combining Samsung vRAN and NVIDIA AI platforms for mobile network modernization.
items.why: AI silicon demand is expanding from datacenter to telecom infrastructure, widening GPU and accelerator deployment fronts.

items.title: Samsung begins mass production of AI-optimized HBM4
items.what: Samsung announced mass production start of HBM4 for AI workloads and highlighted next-generation memory stack positioning.
items.why: HBM availability directly impacts AI server supply and pricing, especially for accelerator-heavy systems.

items.title: TSMC reportedly evaluating UAE fab plan
items.what: Industry media reported TSMC may consider a UAE fab using advanced process assumptions, pending feasibility and policy alignment.
items.why: Potential geographic diversification matters for long-term supply-chain risk and strategic manufacturing footprint.
